message.content:
Analyze the project at C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\WELD_MONITOR_IM\

I need to understand:
1. What platform/framework is it? (.NET version, C# or VB, WinForms/WPF?)
2. UI theme - colors, fonts, styling approach (dark theme? custom controls?)
3. Project structure - how folders are organized
4. NuGet packages used
5. Key UI patterns - how forms are styled, button styles, panel layouts
6. Resolution/form size settings

Read the main form designer file, any theme/style files, the .csproj file, and a few key UI files to understand the visual style.

Return a concise summary focused on: platform, UI theme details, project structure pattern, and key packages.

content.text: 내가 C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\WELD_MONITOR_IM\ 프로젝트를 분석하겠다. 먼저 프로젝트 구조를 파악하고 주요 파일들을 읽어보겠다.
좋다. C# 프로젝트다. 이제 프로젝트 구조와 주요 파일들을 살펴보겠다.

content.content:
1→<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
     2→
     3→  <PropertyGroup>
     4→    <OutputType>WinExe</OutputType>
     5→    <TargetFramework>net8.0-windows</TargetFramework>
     6→    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
     7→    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
     8→    <UseWPF>true</UseWPF>
     9→    <StartupObject>WeldMonitorV2.App</StartupObject>
    10→    <ApplicationIcon>ftech.ico</ApplicationIcon>
    11→  </PropertyGroup>
    12→
    13→  <ItemGroup>
    14→    <PackageReference Include="LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF" Version="2.0.0-rc2" />
    15→    <PackageReference Include="System.IO.Ports" Version="8.0.0" />
    16→  </ItemGroup>
    17→
    18→  <!-- Copy DailyCheck photos to output -->
    19→  <ItemGroup>
    20→    <None Include="Assets\DailyCheck\**" CopyToOutputDirectory="PreserveNewest" LinkBase="Assets\DailyCheck" />
    21→  </ItemGroup>
    22→
    23→  <!-- Exclude designs folder from build -->
    24→  <ItemGroup>
    25→    <Compile Remove="designs\**" />
    26→    <Page Remove="designs\**" />
    27→    <None Remove="designs\**" />
    28→    <Content Remove="designs\**" />
    29→  </ItemGroup>
    30→
    31→</Project>
    32→
ls: cannot access 'C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\WELD_MONITOR_IM\WELD_MONITOR_IAM_V2"': No such file or directory

content.text: 프로젝트 구조를 확인했다. 이제 UI 테마와 스타일을 파악하기 위해 App.xaml과 메인 폼을 읽어보겠다.

content.content:
1→<Application x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.App"
     2→             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→             Startup="OnAppStartup">
     5→    <Application.Resources>
     6→        <ResourceDictionary>
     7→            <!-- Colors -->
     8→            <Color x:Key="BackgroundColor">#1E1E1E</Color>
     9→            <Color x:Key="CardColor">#2B2B2B</Color>
    10→            <Color x:Key="CardHoverColor">#363636</Color>
    11→            <Color x:Key="BorderColor">#3A3A3A</Color>
    12→            <Color x:Key="TextPrimaryColor">#FFFFFF</Color>
    13→            <Color x:Key="TextSecondaryColor">#9CA3AF</Color>
    14→            <Color x:Key="CurrentBlueColor">#60A5FA</Color>
    15→            <Color x:Key="VoltageGreenColor">#4ADE80</Color>
    16→            <Color x:Key="FlowOrangeColor">#FB923C</Color>
    17→            <Color x:Key="SuccessColor">#22C55E</Color>
    18→            <Color x:Key="ErrorColor">#EF4444</Color>
    19→            <Color x:Key="WarningColor">#F59E0B</Color>
    20→
    21→            <!-- Brushes -->
    22→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="BackgroundBrush" Color="{StaticResource BackgroundColor}"/>
    23→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="CardBrush" Color="{StaticResource CardColor}"/>
    24→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="CardHoverBrush" Color="{StaticResource CardHoverColor}"/>
    25→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="BorderBrush" Color="{StaticResource BorderColor}"/>
    26→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="TextPrimaryBrush" Color="{StaticResource TextPrimaryColor}"/>
    27→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="TextSecondaryBrush" Color="{StaticResource TextSecondaryColor}"/>
    28→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="CurrentBlueBrush" Color="{StaticResource CurrentBlueColor}"/>
    29→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="VoltageGreenBrush" Color="{StaticResource VoltageGreenColor}"/>
    30→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="FlowOrangeBrush" Color="{StaticResource FlowOrangeColor}"/>
    31→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="SuccessBrush" Color="{StaticResource SuccessColor}"/>
    32→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="ErrorBrush" Color="{StaticResource ErrorColor}"/>
    33→            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="WarningBrush" Color="{StaticResource WarningColor}"/>
    34→
    35→            <!-- Sidebar Button Style -->
    36→            <Style x:Key="SidebarButtonStyle" TargetType="Button">
    37→                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
    38→                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
    39→                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
    40→                <Setter Property="Width" Value="56"/>
    41→                <Setter Property="Height" Value="50"/>
    42→                <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
    43→                <Setter Property="Template">
    44→                    <Setter.Value>
    45→                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    46→                            <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
    47→                                    CornerRadius="6" Padding="2,4">
    48→                                <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    49→                            </Border>
    50→                            <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    51→                                <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    52→                                    <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardHoverBrush}"/>
    53→                                </Trigger>
    54→                            </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    55→                        </ControlTemplate>
    56→                    </Setter.Value>
    57→                </Setter>
    58→            </Style>
    59→
    60→            <!-- Card Style -->
    61→            <Style x:Key="CardStyle" TargetType="Border">
    62→                <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardBrush}"/>
    63→                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
    64→                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
    65→                <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="8"/>
    66→            </Style>
    67→
    68→            <!-- KPI Value Style -->
    69→            <Style x:Key="KPIValueStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
    70→                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="28"/>
    71→                <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
    72→                <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
    73→            </Style>
    74→
    75→            <!-- KPI Label Style -->
    76→            <Style x:Key="KPILabelStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
    77→                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
    78→                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
    79→                <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
    80→            </Style>
    81→
    82→            <!-- Status Badge Style -->
    83→            <Style x:Key="StatusBadgeStyle" TargetType="Border">
    84→                <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="4"/>
    85→                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
    86→            </Style>
    87→
    88→            <!-- DataGrid Style -->
    89→            <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
    90→                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
    91→                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
    92→                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
    93→                <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="Transparent"/>
    94→                <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#252525"/>
    95→                <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
    96→                <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
    97→                <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
    98→            </Style>
    99→
   100→            <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
   101→                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
   102→                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
   103→                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="11"/>
   104→                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,8"/>
   105→                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,0,1"/>
   106→                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
   107→            </Style>
   108→
   109→            <Style TargetType="DataGridCell">
   110→                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
   111→                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,8"/>
   112→                <Setter Property="Template">
   113→                    <Setter.Value>
   114→                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="DataGridCell">
   115→                            <Border Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
   116→                                <ContentPresenter VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
   117→                            </Border>
   118→                        </ControlTemplate>
   119→                    </Setter.Value>
   120→                </Setter>
   121→                <Style.Triggers>
   122→                    <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
   123→                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardHoverBrush}"/>
   124→                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
   125→                    </Trigger>
   126→                </Style.Triggers>
   127→            </Style>
   128→
   129→            <!-- ComboBox dark theme -->
   130→            <Style TargetType="ComboBox">
   131→                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
   132→                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
   133→                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
   134→                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
   135→                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
   136→                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
   137→                <Setter Property="Template">
   138→                    <Setter.Value>
   139→                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="ComboBox">
   140→                            <Grid>
   141→                                <ToggleButton x:Name="ToggleBtn" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
   142→                                              BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
   143→                                              BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
   144→                                              IsChecked="{Binding IsDropDownOpen, Mode=TwoWay, RelativeSource={RelativeSource TemplatedParent}}"
   145→                                              ClickMode="Press">
   146→                                    <ToggleButton.Template>
   147→                                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="ToggleButton">
   148→                                            <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
   149→                                                    BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
   150→                                                    BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
   151→                                                    CornerRadius="4" Padding="6,4,20,4">
   152→                                                <Grid>
   153→                                                    <ContentPresenter/>
   154→                                                    <Path Data="M0,0 L4,4 8,0" Fill="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   155→                                                          HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
   156→                                                </Grid>
   157→                                            </Border>
   158→                                        </ControlTemplate>
   159→                                    </ToggleButton.Template>
   160→                                </ToggleButton>
   161→                                <ContentPresenter IsHitTestVisible="False"
   162→                                                  Content="{TemplateBinding SelectionBoxItem}"
   163→                                                  ContentTemplate="{TemplateBinding SelectionBoxItemTemplate}"
   164→                                                  Margin="8,4,20,4" VerticalAlignment="Center"
   165→                                                  HorizontalAlignment="Left">
   166→                                    <ContentPresenter.Resources>
   167→                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
   168→                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
   169→                                        </Style>
   170→                                    </ContentPresenter.Resources>
   171→                                </ContentPresenter>
   172→                                <Popup IsOpen="{TemplateBinding IsDropDownOpen}" Placement="Bottom"
   173→                                       AllowsTransparency="True" Focusable="False" PopupAnimation="Slide">
   174→                                    <Border Background="#2A2A2A" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
   175→                                            BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4" Padding="0,4">
   176→                                        <ScrollViewer MaxHeight="200">
   177→                                            <StackPanel IsItemsHost="True"/>
   178→                                        </ScrollViewer>
   179→                                    </Border>
   180→                                </Popup>
   181→                            </Grid>
   182→                        </ControlTemplate>
   183→                    </Setter.Value>
   184→                </Setter>
   185→            </Style>
   186→
   187→            <Style TargetType="ComboBoxItem">
   188→                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
   189→                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
   190→                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
   191→                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
   192→                <Style.Triggers>
   193→                    <Trigger Property="IsHighlighted" Value="True">
   194→                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
   195→                    </Trigger>
   196→                    <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
   197→                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E3A5F"/>
   198→                    </Trigger>
   199→                </Style.Triggers>
   200→            </Style>
   201→
   202→            <Style TargetType="DataGridRow">
   203→                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
   204→                <Style.Triggers>
   205→                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
   206→                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardHoverBrush}"/>
   207→                    </Trigger>
   208→                </Style.Triggers>
   209→            </Style>
   210→        </ResourceDictionary>
   211→    </Application.Resources>
   212→</Application>
   213→

content.text: 좋다. 이제 메인 윈도우와 콘피그 윈도우를 읽어보겠다.

content.content:
1→<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.MainWindow"
     2→        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→        xmlns:lvc="clr-namespace:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF;assembly=LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF"
     5→        Title="용접 모니터 대시보드"
     6→        Width="1024" Height="768"
     7→        MinWidth="1024" MinHeight="768"
     8→        MaxWidth="1024" MaxHeight="768"
     9→        ResizeMode="NoResize"
    10→        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
    11→        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}">
    12→
    13→    <Grid>
    14→        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
    15→            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
    16→            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
    17→        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
    18→
    19→        <!-- Header Bar -->
    20→        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
    21→                BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1"
    22→                Padding="12,6">
    23→            <Grid>
    24→                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
    25→                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
    26→                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
    27→                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
    28→
    29→                <!-- Title + JIG Info -->
    30→                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
    31→                    <TextBlock Text="WeldMonitor V2" FontSize="16" FontWeight="Bold"
    32→                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Margin="0,0,20,0"
    33→                               VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    34→                    <TextBlock Text="JIG:" FontSize="12" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
    35→                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
    36→                    <TextBlock x:Name="HeaderJigId" Text="---" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"
    37→                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" FontFamily="Consolas"
    38→                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,16,0"/>
    39→                    <TextBlock Text="품번:" FontSize="12" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
    40→                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
    41→                    <TextBlock x:Name="HeaderPartNo" Text="---" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"
    42→                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" FontFamily="Consolas"
    43→                               VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    44→                </StackPanel>
    45→
    46→                <!-- Reset / Start / Stop Buttons -->
    47→                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
    48→                    <Button x:Name="ResetButton" Width="70" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
    49→                            Click="BtnReset_Click">
    50→                        <Button.Template>
    51→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    52→                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#2D2D3D" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
    53→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    54→                                </Border>
    55→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    56→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    57→                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#3D3D55"/>
    58→                                    </Trigger>
    59→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    60→                            </ControlTemplate>
    61→                        </Button.Template>
    62→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    63→                            <TextBlock Text="↺" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"
    64→                                       FontSize="14" Margin="0,0,4,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    65→                            <TextBlock Text="리셋" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"
    66→                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
    67→                        </StackPanel>
    68→                    </Button>
    69→                    <Button x:Name="StartButton" Width="120" Height="38" Cursor="Hand"
    70→                            Margin="6,0,0,0" Click="BtnStart_Click">
    71→                        <Button.Template>
    72→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    73→                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#1A3D2E" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
    74→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    75→                                </Border>
    76→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    77→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    78→                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#22563B"/>
    79→                                    </Trigger>
    80→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    81→                            </ControlTemplate>
    82→                        </Button.Template>
    83→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    84→                            <TextBlock Text="▶" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
    85→                                       FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,6,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    86→                            <TextBlock Text="검사 시작" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
    87→                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
    88→                        </StackPanel>
    89→                    </Button>
    90→                    <Button x:Name="StopButton" Width="70" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
    91→                            Margin="6,0,0,0" Click="BtnStop_Click" IsEnabled="False">
    92→                        <Button.Template>
    93→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    94→                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#3B1818" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
    95→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    96→                                </Border>
    97→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    98→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    99→                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#5B2020"/>
   100→                                    </Trigger>
   101→                                    <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
   102→                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Opacity" Value="0.4"/>
   103→                                    </Trigger>
   104→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
   105→                            </ControlTemplate>
   106→                        </Button.Template>
   107→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
   108→                            <TextBlock Text="■" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"
   109→                                       FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,6,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
   110→                            <TextBlock Text="중지" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"
   111→                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
   112→                        </StackPanel>
   113→                    </Button>
   114→                </StackPanel>
   115→            </Grid>
   116→        </Border>
   117→
   118→        <!-- Body -->
   119→        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
   120→            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   121→                <ColumnDefinition Width="68"/>
   122→                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   123→            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   124→
   125→            <!-- Left Sidebar -->
   126→            <Border Grid.Column="0" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
   127→                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
   128→                <DockPanel>
   129→                    <!-- Navigation: 설정-지그-시퀀스-이미지-검색-점검-작업표준-종료 -->
   130→                    <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Top" Margin="4,6">
   131→                        <!-- 설정 -->
   132→                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
   133→                                ToolTip="환경설정" Click="BtnConfig_Click">
   134→                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
   135→                                <Path Data="M12 6V4m0 2a2 2 0 100 4m0-4a2 2 0 110 4m-6 8a2 2 0 100-4m0 4a2 2 0 110-4m0 4v2m0-6V4m6 6v10m6-2a2 2 0 100-4m0 4a2 2 0 110-4m0 4v2m0-6V4"
   136→                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
   137→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   138→                                <TextBlock Text="설정" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   139→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
   140→                            </StackPanel>
   141→                        </Button>
   142→                        <!-- 지그 -->
   143→                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
   144→                                ToolTip="JIG 관리" Click="BtnJig_Click">
   145→                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
   146→                                <Path Data="M4 4h6v6H4V4zm10 0h6v6h-6V4zM4 14h6v6H4v-6zm10 0h6v6h-6v-6z"
   147→                                      Fill="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
   148→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   149→                                <TextBlock Text="지그" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   150→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>

1→<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.ConfigurationWindow"
     2→        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→        Title="환경설정"
     5→        Width="500" Height="650"
     6→        ResizeMode="NoResize"
     7→        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
     8→        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}">
     9→
    10→    <Window.Resources>
    11→        <!-- Section Header Style -->
    12→        <Style x:Key="SectionHeaderStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
    13→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
    14→            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
    15→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"/>
    16→            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,8"/>
    17→        </Style>
    18→
    19→        <!-- Section Border Style -->
    20→        <Style x:Key="SectionBorderStyle" TargetType="Border">
    21→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardBrush}"/>
    22→            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
    23→            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
    24→            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="6"/>
    25→            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="14,10"/>
    26→            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,10"/>
    27→        </Style>
    28→
    29→        <!-- Label Style -->
    30→        <Style x:Key="FieldLabelStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
    31→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
    32→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
    33→            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
    34→            <Setter Property="Width" Value="140"/>
    35→        </Style>
    36→
    37→        <!-- TextBox Style -->
    38→        <Style x:Key="FieldTextBoxStyle" TargetType="TextBox">
    39→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252525"/>
    40→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
    41→            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
    42→            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
    43→            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
    44→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
    45→            <Setter Property="CaretBrush" Value="White"/>
    46→        </Style>
    47→
    48→
    49→        <!-- CheckBox Style -->
    50→        <Style x:Key="FieldCheckBoxStyle" TargetType="CheckBox">
    51→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
    52→            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
    53→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
    54→        </Style>
    55→
    56→        <!-- Button Style -->

    69→                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    70→                        </Border>

    77→                            </Trigger>
    78→                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    79→                    </ControlTemplate>
    80→                </Setter.Value>

    96→        </Border>
    97→
    98→        <!-- Scrollable Content -->

   100→            <StackPanel Margin="0,4">

content.text: 프로젝트 구조와 파일 목록을 확인했다. 이제 폴더 구조 전체를 파악하겠다.
소스 파일 구조를 명확히 보기 위해 더 자세히 확인하겠다.
완벽하다. 이제 추가로 window의 해상도와 기타 UI 스타일 세부사항을 확인하기 위해 한두 개의 추가 윈도우 파일을 빠르게 읽어보겠다.

content.text: 좋다. 이제 일반적인 버튼 스타일과 폰트 설정을 확인하기 위해 App.xaml.cs를 읽어보겠다.

완벽하다! 이제 모든 필요한 정보를 수집했다. 최종 보고서를 작성하겠다.

## 프로젝트 분석 요약: WELD_MONITOR_IM

### 1. 플랫폼 / 프레임워크
- **.NET 8.0 (Windows-specific)** — `net8.0-windows` TFM
- **WPF (Windows Presentation Foundation)** — XAML 기반 UI
- **언어: C# (최신 기능 활용)** — Nullable enable, Implicit usings, File-scoped namespaces 사용

---

### 2. UI 테마 (다크 테마)
**배경색 스킴:**
- 배경: `#1E1E1E` (진한 회색)
- 카드/패널: `#2B2B2B` (약간 밝은 회색)
- 호버 상태: `#363636`
- 테두리: `#3A3A3A`

**강조 색상:**
- 텍스트 주: `#FFFFFF` (흰색)
- 텍스트 부: `#9CA3AF` (밝은 회색)
- 전류 (Current): `#60A5FA` (파란색)
- 전압 (Voltage): `#4ADE80` (초록색)
- 유량 (Flow): `#FB923C` (주황색)
- 성공: `#22C55E` (녹색)
- 오류: `#EF4444` (빨강색)
- 경고: `#F59E0B` (황색)

**폰트:**
- 기본: 시스템 기본 (WPF 기본값)
- 모노스페이스: Consolas (JIG ID, 수치 표시용)

**스타일 특징:**
- CornerRadius: 4~8px (둥근 모서리)
- 카드 스타일: Border + 투명 배경 + 그라데이션 없음
- ComboBox: 커스텀 ControlTemplate (어두운 드롭다운)
- DataGrid: 투명 배경, 행 구분선, 호버 시 밝은 배경 적용

---

### 3. 프로젝트 구조 (기능 기반)

```
WeldMonitorV2/
├── Core/                       # 인프라
│   ├── AppConfig.cs
│   ├── PathManager.cs
│   ├── Logger.cs
│   └── FilteredValue.cs
├── Models/                     # 데이터 모델
│   ├── JigInfo.cs
│   ├── PointSpec.cs
│   ├── MeasureResult.cs
│   └── IoState.cs
├── Data/                       # 저장소
│   ├── JigRepository.cs
│   ├── ResultCsvWriter.cs
│   └── RawDataCsvWriter.cs
├── Communication/              # 장비 통신
│   ├── ArduinoService.cs
│   ├── ArduinoProtocol.cs
│   ├── ArduinoPortScanner.cs
│   ├── PlcService.cs
│   ├── PlcSignalMap.cs
│   └── XgtFEnetHelper.cs
├── Inspection/                 # 검사 엔진
│   ├── InspectionEngine.cs
│   ├── InspectionState.cs
│   ├── JudgmentLogic.cs
│   ├── AutoPointSetting.cs
│   ├── AutoSpecSetting.cs
│   └── StepHandlers/           # 9개 상태 핸들러
│       ├── IStepHandler.cs
│       ├── WaitJigHandler.cs
│       ├── LoadSpecHandler.cs
│       ├── WeldDetectHandler.cs
│       ├── WeldingHandler.cs
│       ├── JudgeHandler.cs
│       ├── NextPointHandler.cs
│       ├── CycleCompleteHandler.cs
│       ├── SaveResultHandler.cs
│       └── CompleteWaitHandler.cs
├── Assets/                     # 리소스
│   └── DailyCheck/             # 14개 체크 항목 이미지
├── Arduino/                    # Arduino 펌웨어
│   └── MultiMonitor/           # v2.2 (1kHz, ATmega2560)
├── docs/                       # 문서
│   └── plc-signal-map.md
├── App.xaml / App.xaml.cs      # 전역 스타일 + 서비스 DI
├── MainWindow.xaml / .cs       # 메인 대시보드 (1024x768)
├── ConfigurationWindow.xaml    # 환경설정 (500x650)
├── JigWindow.xaml              # JIG 관리 (1024x768)
├── SeqWindow.xaml              # 포인트 시퀀스
├── ImageSetWindow.xaml         # 이미지 좌표 설정
├── SearchWindow.xaml           # 결과 검색
├── RawDataWindow.xaml          # 원본 데이터 보기
├── DailyCheckWindow.xaml       # 일일 점검 (15개 항목)
├── AutoSettingsWindow.xaml     # 자동 스펙 설정 (750x620)
├── PlcMonitorWindow.xaml       # PLC I/O 모니터
├── LogViewerWindow.xaml        # 이벤트 로그 (700x500)
├── NgWindow.xaml               # NG 결과 팝업
├── PasswordWindow.xaml         # 비밀번호 입력
├── CopyTargetDialog.xaml       # JIG 복사 대상 선택
└── ftech.ico                   # 애플리케이션 아이콘
```

---

### 4. NuGet 패키지
```xml
<PackageReference Include="LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF" Version="2.0.0-rc2" />
<PackageReference Include="System.IO.Ports" Version="8.0.0" />
```
- **LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF**: 실시간 차트 (전류/전압/유량)
- **System.IO.Ports**: 직렬 포트 통신 (Arduino)

---

### 5. UI 패턴 및 버튼 스타일

**헤더 바 버튼:**
- **RESET** (노란색 배경 `#2D2D3D`): 경고 색상
- **START** (초록색 배경 `#1A3D2E`): 성공 색상
- **STOP** (빨강색 배경 `#3B1818`): 오류 색상

**사이드바 버튼:**
- 56px 폭 × 50px 높이
- 투명 배경, 호버 시 `#363636` 배경
- 아이콘 + 라벨 세로 배치
- 8개: 설정-지그-시퀀스-이미지-검색-점검-작업표준-종료

**일반 버튼:**
- ToolbarButtonStyle: `#333333` 배경, 호버 시 `#444444`
- PrimaryButtonStyle (저장): `#1E3A5F` (파란색), 호버 시 `#264F7F`
- CornerRadius: 6px

**데이터 그리드:**
- 투명 배경, 홀수/짝수 행 교대 (`#252525`)
- 헤더 배경 투명, 테두리 얇음
- 선택 시 배경 `#363636`

---

### 6. 윈도우 해상도 설정

| 윈도우 | 크기 | ResizeMode |
|--------|------|-----------|
| MainWindow | 1024×768 (고정) | NoResize |
| JigWindow | 1024×768 | CanResize |
| ConfigurationWindow | 500×650 | NoResize |
| AutoSettingsWindow | 750×620 | NoResize |
| LogViewerWindow | 700×500 | NoResize |
| PlcMonitorWindow | - (자동) | NoResize |
| SeqWindow | - (자동) | NoResize |
| SearchWindow | - (자동) | NoResize |

**UI 디자인 원칙:**
- 모든 윈도우 **영어 제목 없음** (전부 한글 타이틀)
- CenterScreen / CenterOwner 시작
- 모달 다이얼로그 사용 (ShowDialog)
- 최대 해상도 타겟: 1024×768

---

### 7. 구성 및 데이터
**런타임 설정 경로:**
- `%LocalAppData%\WeldMonitorV2\config.json` — 앱 설정
- `%LocalAppData%\WeldMonitorV2\jigs.json` — JIG 정의 (기본 128개)
- `%LocalAppData%\WeldMonitorV2\Log\` — 일일 로그
- `%LocalAppData%\WeldMonitorV2\Data\` — 결과/원본 CSV

---

### 요약
**WeldMonitorV2**는 **모던 다크 테마 WPF 애플리케이션** (.NET 8.0)으로, **산업용 용접 모니터링**을 위한 것이다. Arduino(직렬) + LS XGT PLC(TCP) 하드웨어 통신, LiveCharts2 실시간 시각화, 기능 기반 폴더 구조를 활용한다. 모든 UI 요소가 강조 색상(파란색/초록색/주황색)으로 정보를 계층화하며, 최대 1024×768 해상도 제약이 있다.
